name: Strawberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and the next four ingredients (sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt). Stir well to mix.
2. Add the sliced strawberries and stir until evenly distributed.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the buttermilk and the remaining ingredients (vanilla extract, egg, and egg white).
5. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
6. Divide the batter evenly among 18 muffin cups coated with cooking spray.
7. Sprinkle sugar evenly over the top of each muffin.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from the pans immediately and let cool on a wire rack.
